---
title: "sv_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\sv_engine.py"
loc: 157
complexity: 19
logic_score: 0.95
style_score: 3.63
intel_score: 7.51
overall_score: 2.85
---

## Intent
The `sv_engine.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignEngine, __init__, _init_hud_dialogue, _init_vector_engine, handle_cortex_query, record_trace, _render_hud, _handle_proactive, _proactive_install, _proactive_execute, run, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignEngine, __init__, _init_hud_dialogue, _init_vector_engine, handle_cortex_query, record_trace, _render_hud, _handle_proactive, _proactive_install, _proactive_execute, run, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [re](file://re)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [personas](file://personas)
- [utils](file://utils)
- [engine](file://engine)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SovereignEngine`
- `__init__`
- `_init_hud_dialogue`
- `_init_vector_engine`
- `handle_cortex_query`
- `record_trace`
- `_render_hud`
- `_handle_proactive`
- `_proactive_install`
- `_proactive_execute`
- `run`
- `main`
